seriesid=`757073` titleid=`2002193` mediaid=`a915c93fbbf6dd2938702d0b63aa788fe4f8276e`  
_Finn and Jake are excited when Princess Bubblegum invites them to help her collect samples in the Desert of Wonders. But when their vessel is attacked by nasty goo monsters, Finn and Jake start to think the mission has been sabotaged by Princess Bubblegum's robot helper James._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002193_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
